Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nye essence]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 10''' — The Nye's essence provides a chill that imbues the user with speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — The Nye essence is a type of essence Simon uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Simon lacks the reflexes provided by the Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Simon used Nye essence to fill his lungs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Nye essence is a power that can fade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Nye essence can slow down time/scenes for Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Drawing on Nye essence can make Simon's lungs feel like they are burning with ice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Nye essence is a power Simon tried to call up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Simon must hold onto Nye essence to follow the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Nye essence can make a giant lizard feel as if it is pushing through jelly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Simon can draw on the Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon draws Nye essence to match the steel in him.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Nye essence feels like inhaling a blizzard when drawn in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Simon used Nye essence to land a real blow on Chaka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Nye essence can slow the world for Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Nye essence is a type of essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Indirial uses Nye essence to move at high speeds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Simon uses Nye essence to power his movements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Simon needs to restore his Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Valin can summon Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Simon drew on the Nye essence to slip in and out of combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Nye essence can cause lungs to freeze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Valin's blood drops hang oddly in the Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon uses his Nye essence in combat.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Calling upon the Nye essence causes a chill in the lungs and slows down the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — A man in the graveyard was moving fast, suggesting he was holding Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Nye essence can increase a person's speed and grace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Simon does not possess the Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Indirial possesses Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Nye essence can roar into the lungs like a freezing hurricane.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Releasing Nye essence can return the world to almost normal speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Nye essence is a substance or energy that Simon can perceive and use.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Nye essence allows for a casual glide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — The Nye essence can make an instant feel much longer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The Nye have an essence.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
